name: Baguio Green Group Limited
summary: Baguio Green Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides environmental and related services in Hong Kong. It operates through four segments: Cleaning Services Business, Landscaping Services Business, Pest Management Business, and Waste Management and Recycling Business. The company offers cleaning services for commercial and industrial buildings, residential premises, and public hygiene; pest control services, such as integrated pest management, termite control, and leisure places pest control; and landscaping services, including horticultural and lawn maintenance services, as well as supplies landscape materials. It also provides landscape engineering services, such as tree survey and assessment, turfing, and landscape design; and waste management services comprises materials recovery, as well as undertakes construction and other waste management projects. In addition, the company offers automobile repair and plant nursing services; and develops and explores for green technology products. It serves household clients, multinational corporations, semi-government organizations, and government departments. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Lai Chi Kok, Hong Kong. Baguio Green Group Limited is a subsidiary of Baguio Green (Holding) Limited.
